reviews.text: I cannot say enough good things about Emily and Alan. We used Sweet Justice for engagement pictures and wedding pictures and could not be happier with the outcome of each. Not only do we love our pictures but we love Emily and Alan! They both have such a calming, yet fun and enthusiastic presence. My husband and I felt so comfortable and natural during our photos. Emily and Alan give you just enough guidance and posing, but allow for so many candids and time for you to just be yourselves. 10/10 recommend Sweet Justice for any life event you need captured!!

I recently had professional headshots taken by Emily with Foss Photography and was blown away by the experience. From the moment I walked in, she was incredibly welcoming, and the ambiance was cozy and friendly.

I came with my dog without warning. She accommodated my thoughts and ideas as well has her own. I was in and out very quickly without feeling rushed.

I received my proofs in less than a week and ecstatic about them. Going to be hard to narrow them down.

Thanks Emily! I can't wait to bring my family in for updated pictures as well.

I had seen and admired Emily's work over the years through acquaintances and friends who'd had her photograph their own weddings, so when it came time for me to plan my wedding she was up at the top of the list. From the very beginning Emily was fun and intentional and we knew that we wanted to have her and her husband Alan be a part of our day. Living out of state and planning a wedding in Colorado meant we only had short windows of time to work with for scheduling our couples session and they worked with us to make sure we got something on the calendar even when it was close to the holidays. Having Emily & Alan photograph you is the easiest thing in the world because they make you feel like friends right away and the photos they take are truly amazing! When our wedding day came around they worked so well with our venue and all of our vendors, helping us stay in the moment and get to enjoy everything. We feel like investing in photos and video for our wedding was one of the best decisions we made. All of our family and friends continue to be blown away by how they captured our day and still tell us how much they love looking back at the photos and video to remember the day and we couldn't agree more. I would absolutely recommend Emily and Sweet Justice Photography to anyone looking to capture the authentic and beautiful moments of their wedding day both big and small.

I first met Emily in 2022 and immediately gravitated toward her energy. As a fellow photographer myself, I know talent when I see it, and her work has blown me away since day 1. Emily and her husband Alan are a dream team and work together so well. They love to tell stories through their photography style, which is something I really wanted for our wedding day. Even through the unexpected rain, Emily & Alan remained prepared, calm, and professional. They hit it out of the park because my husband and I were floored once we got our sneak peeks the following week! I can only imagine what the rest are going to look like. If you want the best photos you've ever had in your life, hire them ASAP! We look forward to working with you guys again in the future!! Xoxox

We were married in October and Emily was our amazing photographer! She was incredibly professional from beginning to end and has this awesome ability to be fun and personable to everyone! Our pictures turned out incredible and I have had friends and family raving to me about how amazing they are! I loved that she had two photographers so no moment was ever missed and she always had an endless flow of poses and looks. I know it was the first time she had done a wedding at my venue and she nailed it! I really wanted a photographer who was going to be amazing at the close up details as my venue was all inside and Emily captured everything perfectly. I also loved that she sent me some of the photos right away the day after the wedding so that I could post on social media before any of my guests did. This was highly appreciated because you never know what photos your guests will post and they may not be the best! When we received our package with the final pictures it was seriously the prettiest presentation I have ever seen with prints and Polaroids and chocolate and more! I will definitely be using Emily again and would highly recommend her to any of my friends and family!
